module_sme_rollup.name: Customer Foundation
module_sme_rollup.description: Unified customer records with complete interaction history, consent compliance, and data quality.

statements.text: Store and maintain unified customer records with core attributes, hierarchy, and multiple address types.
statements.rationale: Single source of truth for customer data

statements.text: Record all customer interactions—emails, calls, meetings, orders, tickets—in unified activity timeline.
Automatically detect and merge duplicate contacts and accounts to maintain data hygiene.
Capture and enforce GDPR, PDPA consent flags; process deletion requests and enforce retention policies.
Segment customers by tags, attributes, and groups; track feedback and actions taken.

module_sme_rollup.name: Sales Pipeline & Execution
module_sme_rollup.description: Lead-to-opportunity conversion, pipeline visibility, and deal management with forecasting.

statements.text: Capture leads from web forms, email, imports, and phone; qualify and assign by configurable rules.
Score leads using rules-based and predictive models; enrich with external firmographic data.
Convert leads to opportunities with full history; configure flexible sales stages by team or product.
statements.rationale: Preserve audit trail and adapt to business process

statements.text: Assign opportunities with win probability, expected close date, and forecast amount per deal.
statements.rationale: Accurate pipeline forecasting and deal tracking

statements.text: Enable multi-team collaboration with drag-and-drop stage transitions and competitor tracking.
statements.rationale: Streamlined deal progression and market intelligence

statements.text: Calculate pipeline-weighted forecasts; define quotas by rep, team, region, and period with attainment tracking.

module_sme_rollup.name: Transactions & Revenue
module_sme_rollup.description: Orders, invoicing, pricing, and payment processing with complete audit trail.

statements.text: Create orders with line items, quantities, and pricing; generate invoices with customizable templates.
Track order status from pending through confirmation, shipment, and delivery with customer visibility.
Record and monitor payment status independently per invoice; process cash and cashless methods.
statements.rationale: Accurate cash flow and payment reconciliation

statements.text: Maintain multiple price lists by customer group, region, and currency with quantity-based volume discounts.
Create time-bound promotions and coupon codes with approval workflows and redemption tracking.
statements.rationale: Controlled promotional execution and ROI measurement

statements.text: Maintain complete audit trail of all order, invoice, payment, and discount changes.

statements.text: Define loyalty program mechanics, manage reward catalog, and automate tiered membership upgrades.
statements.rationale: Increased repeat purchase and customer lifetime value

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your customer information is accurate, accessible, and secure across all devices and teams. Singapore SMEs need this because your sales team works on phones during site visits, in offices, and from home—and you must comply with PDPA regulations on customer data. When your sales rep visits a client on-site and needs instant access to contact history, or when you integrate with your accounting software to avoid double-entry, this foundation makes it happen.

Sales Transactions.narrative: This family handles the core mechanics of selling: creating orders, setting prices, tracking deals, and paying commissions. Every Singapore SME needs this because it directly impacts cash flow and team motivation—you must invoice customers accurately and on time, manage discounts without eroding margins, and fairly calculate what your sales team earns. When you land a large deal with a custom price and need to forecast next quarter's revenue, or when you want to reward your top performer with transparent commission tracking, this family delivers.

CRM & Relationship.narrative: This family tracks every interaction with prospects and customers—calls, meetings, emails, notes—so no lead falls through the cracks and every opportunity is managed systematically. Singapore SMEs benefit because your sales team can see the full history of each customer relationship, prioritise follow-ups, and collaborate without duplicating effort. When a prospect goes quiet and you need to know who last spoke to them and what was promised, or when a new team member joins and needs to understand the status of all active deals, this family keeps everyone aligned.

Marketing.narrative: This family automates customer outreach, builds your online presence, and measures campaign performance—turning prospects into customers at scale. Singapore SMEs should care because you can nurture leads while your team focuses on closing deals, build a professional website without hiring an agency, and understand which marketing efforts actually drive revenue. When you run a LinkedIn campaign to reach new customers or send automated follow-up emails to prospects who downloaded your brochure, this family multiplies your marketing impact without proportional cost.

Commerce.narrative: This family enables you to sell online—whether through your own storefront, B2B portal, or third-party marketplaces like Shopee and Lazada—and manage inventory and customer experience across all channels. Singapore SMEs need this because e-commerce is no longer optional; you can reach customers 24/7, reduce dependency on physical locations, and scale without hiring more staff. When you sell on multiple marketplaces simultaneously and need real-time inventory sync to avoid overselling, or when a customer wants to order online but pick up in-store, this family makes omnichannel retail seamless.

Customer Service.narrative: This family organises customer support into a structured workflow—tickets, routing, SLA tracking, and knowledge base—so every issue is resolved fairly and quickly. Singapore SMEs should care because poor service kills repeat business and referrals; a ticketing system ensures no customer complaint is forgotten and your team can measure response time and resolution quality. When a customer emails a complaint and you need to track it through resolution, or when you want to reduce support costs by building a self-service knowledge base, this family turns chaos into process.

Analytics.narrative: This family transforms raw CRM data into dashboards, forecasts, and AI-driven insights—so you can see what's working, predict what's next, and act faster. Singapore SMEs benefit because you can spot trends early (e.g., which customer segments are most profitable, which reps are at risk of missing quota), forecast cash flow accurately, and identify which prospects are most likely to buy. When you need to decide whether to hire a new sales rep or when you want to know which customers are at risk of churning so you can save them, this family gives you the intelligence to lead confidently.
